tools.name: eks_list_addons
tools.description: List managed add-ons installed on an EKS cluster (name, version, status). Queries the AWS API and returns structured JSON.

tools.name: eks_find_terraform
tools.description: Extract EKS resource declarations and Kubernetes version from Terraform files. Returns cluster config and module references found under the given directory.

params.name: root_dir
params.description: Root directory to scan for .tf files

tools.name: eks_helm_list_releases
tools.description: List Helm releases deployed in the active kubeconfig context on EKS. Returns release name, namespace, chart, and installed version.

tools.name: eks_verify_environment
tools.description: Check that required CLIs (aws, kubectl, helm) are installed and AWS credentials are active. Returns a pass/fail status for each prerequisite.

params.name: profile
params.description: AWS CLI named profile to validate
